flow_points: Pakistan scored 47 runs for 1 wicket in the Powerplay (RR: 7.83), establishing an early lead.
Sahibzada Farhan anchored Pakistan's innings with 100 runs from 59 balls, contributing 50.3% of the total.
Pakistan shifted momentum with a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs, achieving a Run Rate of 13.6.
In response, Namibia scored 40 runs for 2 wickets in their Powerplay (RR: 6.67), falling behind the required rate.
Usman Tariq delivered a crucial spell, taking 4 wickets for just 16 runs from 3.3 overs.
Shadab Khan maintained bowling pressure with a key spell of 3 wickets for 19 runs from 4.0 overs.
Mohammad Nawaz supported with 1 wicket for 22 runs from 4.0 overs.
Namibia struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 99.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
Pakistan secured a dominant victory by 102 runs.
